chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-792 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.08.2025 Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 24.09.2024, which is almost 01 year ago, the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. In the last 01 year, the petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this old petition fixed for hearing. Today, despite the lapse of 01 year, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
